# Whats91 - LLM/MCP Entry Point

> Enterprise WhatsApp Cloud API Platform - Official Meta Business Solution Provider for India. Transform business communication with 500+ msgs/sec throughput, 99.9% uptime, and seamless ERP integrations.

## Language
- Primary: English
- Secondary: Hindi (partial support)

---

## HIGH PRIORITY PAGES (Top 10)

1. [Busy ERP Integration](/solutions/busy-erp) - Core product: automate invoices, payment reminders, 24/7 balance inquiry chatbot for Busy Accounting
2. [WhatsApp Templates Library](/whatsapp-templates) - 20+ pre-approved message templates for marketing, utility, authentication
3. [Chatbot Flow Library](/chatbot-flows) - Pre-built conversational flows for ERP automation
4. [Google Sheets Integration](/google-sheets-integration) - Sync WhatsApp campaign responses to Google Sheets in real-time
5. [Pricing](/pricing) - Transparent WhatsApp API pricing with zero markup guarantee
6. [WhatsApp Coexistence Guide](/whatsapp-coexistence) - Use Business App + Cloud API simultaneously on one number
7. [Free Tools](/tools) - WhatsApp link generator, QR code, cost calculator, and more
8. [Blog](/blog) - Technical articles on WhatsApp API, ERP integration, automation
9. [Contact](/contact) - Sales inquiries, technical support, demo requests
10. [About](/about) - Company background, team, mission

---

## SOLUTIONS (By Intent)

### Marketing & Engagement
- [Marketing Campaigns](/solutions/marketing) - Broadcast campaigns, promotional messaging, customer engagement
- [Utility Messages](/solutions/utility) - Order updates, shipping alerts, transactional notifications

### ERP Integrations
- [Busy ERP Integration](/solutions/busy-erp) - Invoice automation, balance inquiry, payment reminders for Busy Accounting
- [Busy API](/solutions/busy-api) - Direct API integration for custom workflows
- [Busy Reports](/solutions/busy-reports) - Automated report delivery via WhatsApp
- [Google Sheet Sync](/solutions/busy-google-sheet) - Real-time data sync to Google Sheets

### Automation
- [Payment Reminders](/solutions/payment-reminders) - Automated collection reminders, due date alerts

---

- [API Pricing](/pricing) - Per-message rates, volume discounts, zero markup guarantee
- [Marketing Rates](/pricing#marketing) - Promotional message pricing
- [Utility Rates](/pricing#utility) - Transactional message pricing

## RESOURCES

### Templates & Flows
- [WhatsApp Templates](/whatsapp-templates) - Pre-approved message templates by category
- [Chatbot Flow Library](/chatbot-flows) - ERP automation flows for Busy, Tally
- [Google Sheets Integration](/google-sheets-integration) - Campaign response sync
- [Co-Existing Mode](/whatsapp-coexistence) - Business App + Cloud API guide

### Tools
- [All Free Tools](/tools) - Complete tool collection
- [WhatsApp Link Generator](/tools/whatsapp-link-generator) - Generate wa.me links
- [QR Code Generator](/tools/qr-code-generator) - Create QR codes for multiple formats
- [API Cost Calculator](/tools/whatsapp-api-cost-calculator) - Estimate messaging costs
- [Lead ROI Calculator](/tools/lead-qualification-roi-calculator) - Calculate lead automation ROI

### Blog
- [Blog Index](/blog) - All articles
- [WhatsApp Cloud API Guide 2026](/blog/whatsapp-cloud-api-complete-guide-2026) - Complete API reference
- [WhatsApp Web Logout Rule India](/blog/whatsapp-web-6-hour-logout-rule-india-2026) - 6-hour logout explanation
- [Busy WhatsApp Integration Benefits](/blog/busy-accounting-whatsapp-integration-benefits) - ERP automation ROI

## KEY ENTITIES

- **Organization**: Wilford Technology (Parent Company)
- **Platform**: Whats91
- **Primary Market**: India
- **Technology Stack**: Next.js, TypeScript, WhatsApp Cloud API, Prisma
- **Industry**: Business Communication, Enterprise Messaging, ERP Integration

---

- Busy Accounting Software

- Zoho CRM (Coming Soon)

- Google Sheets

- GDPR Compliant
- ISO 27001 Certified Infrastructure

- Data Localization: India
